linkCatalogo.citazione: Academic Courses 2026/2027 ... COURSE CATALOGUE English Courses for Incoming Erasmus+ students

notaDisponibilita.citazione: The courses will take place only if the number of enrolled students is more than 6 (six).

requisitoLingua.citazione: Language requirements Level of English must be at least B2 for non-native English speaking students. Additionally, none of the 2 language skills can be under B2.

scadenzeOspitante.citazione: Nomination Deadline May 1st; Application Deadline May 15th ... Online Nomination ... Spring - 2027 November 1st ... Application Deadlines May 15th ... November 15th.

linkCatalogo.citazione: This is the course offer for Exchange students. Courses are in English, taught by TalTech.

notaDisponibilita.citazione: The chosen courses must correspond about 70% to the students' curriculum and level of studies at the home university ... As an Erasmus/exchange student, you cannot defend your final thesis at TalTech. The student cannot do individual work ... at TalTech.

requisitoLingua.citazione: B2 language highly recommanded (Language certificate mandatory for the Faculty of Law, Economics and Management only)

scadenzeOspitante.citazione: Online application deadline 2026/2027: First semester (September–January) or academic year: until 15 May 2026. Second semester (January–May): until 30 October 2026.

notaDisponibilita.citazione: You cannot choose courses from different faculties or departments due to timetable conflicts. ... Polytech Paris-Saclay: Choose courses from a single academic year and a single program. ... Faculty of Law, Economics, and Management: Choose courses either in Law or in Economics/Management
